expectations.text: States that fetch_timeseries does not exist on Session
expectations.evidence: States: 'No. Session does not have a fetch_timeseries() method, and no method by that name exists anywhere in the Spyglass source.'

expectations.text: Does not invent a method signature or behavior
expectations.evidence: Refuses to invent: 'I won't invent a signature for it.' Only describes the actual SortedSpikesGroup.fetch_spike_data signature instead.

expectations.text: Redirects to the correct source for spike timestamps
expectations.evidence: Redirects to SortedSpikesGroup.fetch_spike_data in spyglass.spikesorting.analysis.v1.group with the full pipeline flow.
